zh.Melun-Nord, Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Île-d: 法國瑟-吉馬內默倫梅倫-諾爾德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume De Melun II於1190年出生在法國瑟-吉馬內默倫時，他的父親Adam De Melun II18歲，母親Aremburge d'Halluin14歲。他於1203年與Agnès de Montreuil-Bellay在法國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1221年5月4日在他的家鄉享年31歲，埋葬在法國瑟-吉馬內。

zh-hans.Melun-Nord, Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Île-d: 法国瑟-吉馬內默倫梅倫-諾爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume De Melun II于1190年出生在法国瑟-吉馬內默倫时，他的父亲Adam De Melun II18岁，母亲Aremburge d'Halluin14岁。他于1203年与Agnès de Montreuil-Bellay在法国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1221年5月4日在他的家乡享年31岁，埋葬在法国瑟-吉馬內。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Melun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Alvar, Anders, Hilmer, Hiltrud, Sven.

Swedish: probably an ornamental or habitational name formed with the (placename) element mel, from Old Norse methal ‘mid, middle’, + the adjectival suffix -in, a derivative of Latin -in(i)us ‘relating to’.
Czech (Melín): from a pet form of the personal name Melichar ‘Melchior’.

variants.name: Lemelin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Normand, Monique, Alcide, Armand, Damien, Emile, Gaston, Marcel, Rosaire.
French: from the personal name Melin (see Melin 4) or its cognate Emelin, with fused definite article l(e).
History: Jean Lemelin dit (Le) Tourangeau from Chartres in Eure-et-Loir, France, married Marguerite Brassard in Quebec City, QC, in 1658.

variants.name: Melichar
meanings: Czech; Slovak (also Melichár): from a vernacular form of the Biblical personal name Melchior .

variants.name: Meline
meanings: French: from a shortened form of the personal name Ameline, feminine form of Amelin (see Melin 4).

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume De Melun II was born in 1190, in Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France, his father, Adam De Melun II, was 18 and his mother, Aremburge d'Halluin, was 14. He married Agnès de Montreuil-Bellay in 1203, in France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 4 May 1221, in his hometown, at the age of 31, and was buried in Seine-et-Marne, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume De Melun II est né en 1190, à Melun, Seine-et-Marne, France, son père, Adam De Melun II, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Aremburge d'Halluin, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Agnès de Montreuil-Bellay en 1203, à France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 4 mai 1221, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterré à Seine-et-Marne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume De Melun II 1190 in Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Adam De Melun II 18 und seine Mutter Aremburge d'Halluin 14. Er hat 1203 in Frankreich Agnès de Montreuil-Bellay geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 4. Mai 1221 im Alter von 31 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Seine-et-Marne, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume De Melun II è nato il nel 1190 nel Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, il suo padre, Adam De Melun II, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Aremburge d'Halluin, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Agnès de Montreuil-Bellay nel 1203, nel Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 4 maggio 1221, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolto a Seine-et-Marne, Francia.

ja.Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Fr: フランスセアイネ-エト-マルンメルン
ja.Abbaye du Jard, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-F: フランスセアイネ-エト-マルン
ja.Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Île-de-France, Ki: フランスセアイネ-エト-マルンメルン
ja.Melun-Nord, Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Île-d: フランスセアイネ-エト-マルンメルンメルン-ノード
ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume De Melun IIが1190年にフランスセアイネ-エト-マルンメルンで生まれた時，父Adam De Melun IIは18歳，母Aremburge d'Halluinは14歳であった。1203年にフランスでAgnès de Montreuil-Bellayと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1221年5月4日に故郷で31歳で死去し，フランスセアイネ-エト-マルンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume De Melun II(이)가 1190년 프랑스 세이인-트-마니 멜루에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam De Melun II(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Aremburge d'Halluin(은)는 14세였다. 그는 1203년 프랑스에서 Agnès de Montreuil-Bellay(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1221년 5월 4일 그의 고향에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 세이인-트-마니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume De Melun II nasceu em 1190, em Melun, Seine-et-Marne, França, seu pai, Adam De Melun II, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Aremburge d'Halluin, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnès de Montreuil-Bellay em 1203, em França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 4 de maio de 1221, em sua cidade natal, com 31 anos, e foi sepultado em Seine-et-Marne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume De Melun II родился в 1190 г. в местности мелун, сине-ет-марн, Франция, его отцу по имени Adam De Melun II было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Aremburge d'Halluin, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnès de Montreuil-Bellay в 1203 г. в местности Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер 4 мая 1221 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 31 год и был похоронен в местности сине-ет-марн, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume De Melun II nació en 1190, en Melun, Seine-et-Marne, Francia, su papá, Adam De Melun II, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Aremburge d'Halluin, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Agnès de Montreuil-Bellay en 1203, en Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 4 de mayo de 1221, en su pueblo, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultado en Seine-et-Marne, Francia.
